public_practice_name: Matthew L. Blass, DDS & Associates, Ltd.
owner_operator_stated: Dr. Matthew L. Blass, DDS, described on the site as practice owner and a 'second-generation dentist' continuing a family practice at this address since 1968. No mention of Russell Kesman anywhere on the site.
notes: Record names 'Kesman, Russell A DDS' at 129 E Vallette St, Elmhurst IL 60126, phone (630) 834-0663. The vendor-hinted domain mlblassdds.com is live and confirms this EXACT street address (129 E Vallette St., Elmhurst, IL 60126), but the practice currently at that address is 'Matthew L. Blass, DDS & Associates, Ltd.' -- a different entity, self-described as a second-generation family practice operating there since 1968, with its own phone (630) 834-0638 (not the record's 834-0663). No reference to Kesman anywhere on the Blass site. A generic aggregator/template page (russellkesmanf63.dr-leonardo.com, phone 630-834-3839) still lists 'Russell Kesman DDS' at this address but shows no explicit street address and is not a distinct, independently-operated practice website -- it could not be corroborated as Kesman's own current site. Classic successor scenario: the named entity appears to have been succeeded by Blass at the same location.

owner_operator_stated: Site lists Dr. Daniel Rosales, Dr. Jacqueline Magallanes, and Dr. Yvette Valencia as general dentist/practice owners, with Dr. Janette Sanchez as an associate.
notes: Legal entity 'MLB DENTAL, LTD.' operates under the DBA 'Teeth and Things - Full Service Dentistry' at 333 Circle Ave, Forest Park, IL 60130 -- address and phone (708) 771-0330 match the record exactly. No careers/hiring page found (checked homepage, contact page, and /careers which returns 404).

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Steve Napier is named as founder of this location; the office operates under the Grand Dental Group brand (12 Chicagoland locations).
notes: Address (10020 W Grand Ave, Franklin Park, IL 60131) and phone (847) 455-8383 match exactly. Practice is part of Grand Dental Group, a 12-location Chicagoland multi-office dental brand/group. A brand-level 'Talent' careers page exists (granddentalgroup.com/talent.html) but lists no specific titled current openings -- it is generic recruiting content that funnels applicants to Indeed -- so classified as roster_verified rather than hiring_page_found.

public_practice_name: Greenbrook Dental (a Glenbrook Family Dental office)
owner_operator_stated: Dr. Yoon Jung Kim, DDS is named President of the practice entity (per BBB business profile); Dr. Najung Kim and Dr. Hojung Kim are her sisters, all DDS, forming a family-run practice group operating both Glenbrook Family Dental (Glenview) and Greenbrook Dental (Hanover Park).
notes: Vendor-hinted domain greenbrookdental.com is dead -- it redirects to a GoDaddy parked/for-sale page. The practice's real current website is glenbrookfamilydental.com, which has a dedicated Greenbrook Dental page confirming the exact address (1290 Bamburg Ct, Hanover Park, IL 60133) and exact phone ((630) 830-4840). Greenbrook Dental is one of two offices (with Glenbrook Family Dental in Glenview) run by the same Kim-family dentist group -- a small independent 2-location practice, not a national DSO/chain. No careers/hiring content found on any page fetched.

Address (1098 East Lake Street, Hanover Park, IL 60133) and phone (630) 483-7001 match the record exactly. Site lists 4 dentists (Patel, Singh, Sharma, Muppalla) but does not state who owns/operates the practice. No careers/hiring page found.

Vendor-hinted domain faithdentalgroup.com is unreachable (connection refused, both http and https). Web search did not surface any dedicated official website for 'Faith Dental Group, Ltd' at 1645 Irving Park Rd Ste 201, Hanover Park, IL 60133 -- only third-party directories (WebMD, ZocDoc, Healthgrades, OpenCare) list it there with the record's phone (630) 837-4080, naming Drs. Matthew J. Faith, Ronald R. Faith, and John J. Bondi. Some third-party listings also show a same-address, overlapping-doctor entity 'A2Z Family Dental P.C.' (Dr. Matthew Faith + Dr. Zaineb Jafry) that may be a newer name for this office, but its website (a2zfamilydentalpc.com) is also unreachable, so this could not be corroborated as a live successor site either. No usable corroborated website found for either name -- call required to verify current status.
